title: 1.1: Tests that Put operation successfully stores items in the QueueStore without returning an error
1.2: Tests that Put operation verifies items were stored by checking the count after putting multiple items
1.3: Tests that Get retrieves items that were previously stored via Put without returning an error
1.4: Tests that items retrieved via Get match the original items that were stored via Put
1.5: Tests that Del operation removes items from the store without returning an error
1.6: Tests that List returns zero items after all items have been deleted via Del
1.7: Tests that Put returns an error when the store's configured capacity limit is reached
1.8: Tests that List returns items after closing and re-opening the store to verify persistence
1.9: Tests verify consistency between Len() and List() by checking both return expected values
2.1: Places all QueueStore integration tests in internal/store directory following Go conventions.
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the Test<Name> naming convention required by Go testing
3.3: All tests include cleanup to remove test artifacts after execution
4.1: Tests for QueueStore use setup functions to initialize the store before testing
